name: ABM Mustard Wheat Ry
recipeInstructions:
1. Dump yeast into the machine.
2. Add bread flour, lecithin granules to the machine.
3. Fill a measuring cup to 2/3 with warm water.
4. Add mustard until the total liquid measures one full cup.
5. Stir in molasses.
6. Pour all ingredients into the machine.
7. Set the machine to basic bake setting.
8. A small dark loaf with a nice mustardy flavor will result. While dense, it can be sliced quite thinly.
